priority_note: A candidate pair qualifying for more than one group is assigned to the highest-priority group in priority_order_highest_first; lower-priority groups only draw from pairs not already claimed.
generic_pool_construction: q_initial sampled uniformly over the operational interior (margin 0.1 rad from each bound); q_target = clip(q_initial + magnitude * random_unit_direction, lower, upper) with magnitude log-uniformly sampled in [10^-2.0, 10^0.5] rad so the pool spans a wide range of joint/Cartesian separations.

criteria.near_target: position_distance_m <= position_distance_m_low_quantile (33rd percentile of the generic pool) and joint_distance_rad > 1e-6 (not an identical pose).
criteria.medium_target: position_distance_m_low_quantile < position_distance_m < position_distance_m_high_quantile (33rd-66th percentile of the generic pool).
criteria.far_target: position_distance_m >= position_distance_m_high_quantile (66th percentile of the generic pool).
criteria.large_orientation_change: orientation_distance_rad >= its 85th percentile of the generic pool, independent of joint/position distance.
criteria.near_joint_limit: min(minimum_initial_limit_margin, minimum_target_limit_margin) <= its 10th percentile of the generic pool (normalized margin; never negative, i.e. never an operational-limit violation).
criteria.near_singularity: min(initial_sigma_min, target_sigma_min) <= its 10th percentile of the generic pool (actual computed Jacobian singular value, not an assumed label).
